rows.consumerBehaviorFound: CssGap parser accepts one to four integer components and the layout consumer reads top, right, bottom, and left components directly.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Future repair may support source-backed one-to-four integer CssGap forms; decide whether to reject negative gap components even though the source stores signed integers.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Prefer a structured one/four-side gap editor with optional advanced raw CssGap input.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: CssGap parser accepts one to four integer components and monitor/workspace layout consumers use the parsed components directly for reserved edge areas.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Future repair may support source-backed one-to-four integer CssGap forms; use conservative policy for negative values until layout-risk review approves them.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Prefer a structured edge-gap editor with top/right/bottom/left fields and optional raw CssGap preview.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: The consumer treats an empty value as system-locale fallback and otherwise passes the configured string to the localization engine.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Keep line-safe string validation; do not require locale existence in the writer.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Document empty value as system-locale fallback and preserve spaces only if line-safe input already allows them.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: The consumer handles empty/default, adaptive, flat, and custom space-separated numeric point profiles; unknown non-empty values log a warning and fall back to default.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Future repair should replace freeform line-safe validation with finite choices plus an advanced custom grammar: custom <step> <point...>.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Offer default/adaptive/flat choices and an advanced custom profile editor.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: The consumer only applies scroll_points inside a custom acceleration profile branch, splits on spaces, parses a step value followed by zero or more point doubles, and logs invalid tokens.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Future repair should validate a finite space-separated double list with a leading step and require custom accel-profile context in UI guidance.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Expose only with custom acceleration profile context and label the first number as step.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: Non-empty values are resolved relative to the current config path, opened as an XKB keymap file, and fall back to named XKB rules if opening or compiling fails.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Keep path-like line-safe validation; defer existence/readability checks to optional UI validation because relative paths depend on config context.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Present as optional XKB keymap file path with config-relative path note.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: The renderer uses the configured font family string unless it is the [[EMPTY]] sentinel, in which case it falls back to misc:font_family.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Keep line-safe font-family validation and preserve the [[EMPTY]] fallback sentinel if typed input supports raw values.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Document fallback to misc.font_family and allow font names with spaces.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: Multiple overlay/rendering consumers pass the configured string as a Pango/Cairo font-family name.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Keep line-safe font-family validation; do not perform font installation/existence checks in the writer.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Present as a freeform font family name and keep spaces valid.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: Splash rendering uses the configured font family unless it is the [[EMPTY]] sentinel, in which case it falls back to misc:font_family.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Keep line-safe font-family validation and preserve fallback sentinel semantics.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Document fallback to misc.font_family and allow font names with spaces.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: The swallower skips empty or [[EMPTY]] values, then uses RE2::FullMatch against window class.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Future repair may add RE2 syntax validation if a compatible Rust-side checker is available; line safety alone is source-backed but does not prove regex syntax.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Expose as RE2 full-match regex with empty value disabling swallow matching.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: The swallower uses RE2::FullMatch against window title to remove exception matches from candidates.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Future repair may add RE2 syntax validation if a compatible Rust-side checker is available; keep line-safety guardrails.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Expose as optional RE2 full-match title regex.

rows.consumerBehaviorFound: Empty or [[EMPTY]] disables the shader; non-empty values are resolved relative to the main config, must be regular readable files, and are compiled as final screen fragment shaders.
rows.recommendedValidatorPolicy: Defer validator repair until a shader-path and compile-risk policy is approved; file existence/readability and optional compile proof are source-backed candidates.
rows.recommendedUiEditorPolicy: Treat as an optional shader file path with warning that invalid shaders surface render errors.
